params.SpellDescription: Permanents your opponents control lose hexproof, indestructible, protection, shroud, and ward until end of turn.

remaining_params.SpellDescription: Permanents your opponents control lose hexproof, indestructible, protection, shroud, and ward until end of turn.

params.TriggerDescription: Whenever a creature an opponent controls becomes the target of a spell or ability you control, put a bounty counter on that creature.
Whenever a creature with a bounty counter on it dies, put two +1/+1 counters on CARDNAME.
